phase_name: ddharmon-ui v2 rewire + biomapper design system + visualization suite

completed_tasks.name: P0 backend: v2 engine behind a stable UI contract (engine/contract.py + engine/adapter.py; adapter drives harmonize_leanb via injected sync/batch/preview callbacks, never re-implements the flow); runner/app/jobs on the contract; 9 tests incl. real e2e

P1 frontend: types.ts/api.ts mirror the contract; Configure (runMode batch/sync/preview, cdeSet, specs toggle) / Run (data-driven progress) / Review (records by verdict, expandable detail, approve-refine-reject, exports)
P2 styling: biomapper-ui shared PH design system — sidebar+topbar AppShell chrome (was top-bar-only), bordered cards, tabular-nums stats, dashboard breadcrumb+mode badge; screenshot-verified

Viz: match-journey Sankey (cohort->verdict->destination); analytics overview (coverage table + size/verdict bars + cosine histogram + cohort-overlap heatmap); enriched review row (Monarch provenance idiom)

Viz: candidate-review workbench (/job/:id/workbench — CDEMapper Fig4 idiom) + CORE additive change (CandidateCDE + candidates on LeanBRecord, persisted in assemble_leanb) + contract/UIRecord candidates; +regression test
Viz: cohort-colored embedding atlas (adapter computes PCA(2) of field embeddings -> UIResult.atlas; recharts ScatterChart). No core change.

remaining_tasks.name: P3 deploy: ddharmon-ui functional -> DEPLOYED (Lightsail + Squarespace subdomain, systemd+nginx+certbot; deploy/README.md runbook), repin ddharmon dep from private git to public PyPI, flip repo public. The COUPLED 1.0.0 gate — ddharmon 1.0.0 tag waits on this.

blockers.description: P3 deploy needs Lightsail + Squarespace access (infra) — user-gated long pole
Repin requires ddharmon 0.7.0+ published to PyPI first (currently held); repo pins private git today
blockers.workaround: keep private git pin until PyPI publish

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to push the two branches / open PRs (nothing pushed yet)
human_actions_pending.context: core f5802a9 on feature/harmonization-v2-split-aware; ddharmon-ui feature/v2-contract-and-viz (4fff6e4, e1bf4d8)

human_actions_pending.action: Provision + run P3 deploy; publish ddharmon to PyPI; flip ddharmon-ui public

decisions.decision: GUI couples to ddharmon ONLY through backend/engine (adapter+contract); adapter injects per-stage callbacks into harmonize_leanb rather than re-implementing stages
decisions.rationale: user requirement: pipeline churn must not force GUI changes; blast radius confined to _record_to_ui + one callback line

decisions.decision: Run mode = Batch API default + sync option + preview(no-LLM)
decisions.rationale: deployed tool must be cost-bounded; v2 needs LLM to produce any records

decisions.decision: v2 requires a CDE catalog (cdeSet endorsed|full; no 'none')
decisions.rationale: assignment to the given backbone is the v2 thesis; _find_cde_dict raises without it

decisions.decision: Shared PH design system mirrored from biomapper-ui dev; tokens were already byte-identical so P2 = matching component/layout patterns
Candidate list surfaced via an ADDITIVE CandidateCDE field on LeanBRecord (backward-compatible)
decisions.rationale: workbench needs ranked candidates; v1 discarded them; keep core churn minimal

decisions.decision: Embedding atlas computed in the adapter (PCA of already-built embeddings), NOT the core
decisions.rationale: no core change needed; adapter already holds the embedded dicts

next_action: Either (a) push the two branches and open PRs, or (b) plan P3 deploy: read ddharmon-ui/deploy/README.md, then Lightsail provision + repin. All code through the viz suite is committed + green.
context_notes: Large multi-session GUI buildout is COMPLETE through P2 + all 5 requested visualizations, committed across both repos (core candidates feature + ddharmon-ui backend/frontend). Everything green: core 23 leanb tests, ddharmon-ui 9 backend tests, frontend typecheck/build, ruff/black/pyright. The ONLY remaining 1.0 item is the user-gated P3 deploy. NOTE: the CORE repo's .planning/.continue-here.md tracks a DIFFERENT active thread (v1.0.0/v3 pipeline+transform-spec work) — left untouched. This GUI handoff lives in the ddharmon-ui repo on purpose.
